llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Announced a final dividend of Rs 10 per equity share. Reported 23.2% year-on-year increase in net profit for Q4 FY26.

Reported strong FY26 growth (7.4% revenue, 13.9% profit), completed Rs 25,000 crore rights issue. Commissioned India's first off-grid 5 MW green hydrogen pilot plant. Group expanding digital infrastructure and AI.
Announced plans to invest nearly Rs 2 lakh crore and target thermal power generation capacity of 45 GW by FY32.
Reported a transmission order book worth Rs 72,000 crore.
Continued expanding city gas distribution and crossed 11 lakh PNG connections.

llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Handled more than 500 million tonnes of cargo during FY26 and aims to increase capacity to one billion tonnes by 2030. Navi Mumbai International Airport became operational.
